# coolify_scheduled_task (Data Source)

Retrieves a single scheduled task by UUID from a Coolify application or service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single scheduled task by UUID
data "coolify_scheduled_task" "example" {
  uuid             = "your-task-uuid"
  application_uuid = "your-app-uuid"
}

output "task_command" {
  value = data.coolify_scheduled_task.example.command
}

output "task_frequency" {
  value = data.coolify_scheduled_task.example.frequency
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the scheduled task.

### Optional

- `application_uuid` (String) The UUID of the application. Exactly one of `application_uuid` or `service_uuid` must be provided.
- `service_uuid` (String) The UUID of the service. Exactly one of `application_uuid` or `service_uuid` must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `command` (String) The command to execute.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the task is enabled.
- `frequency` (String) The cron expression.
- `name` (String) The name of the scheduled task.
